games.headline: Toronto 6, Baltimore 4 — Miles (W)
games.summary: Spencer Miles pitched 4.1 innings, allowing 2 earned runs with 5 strikeouts, leading Toronto past Baltimore 6-4 at Rogers Centre. Kyle Bradish lasted 4.0 innings, giving up 5 earned runs, 3 strikeouts, 3 walks. Offensively for Toronto: E.Clement homered with 3 RBI; J.Sánchez went 2-for-4; B.Valenzuela went 3-for-3, including 2 doubles with 1 RBI. P.Alonso, C.Cowser, B.Alexander went deep for Baltimore. Louis Varland closed it out for the save.

games.headline: Cleveland Blank Texas, 6-0
games.summary: Tanner Bibee pitched 8.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 3 strikeouts, leading Cleveland past Texas 6-0 at Globe Life Field. Jack Leiter lasted 4.2 innings, giving up 5 earned runs, 2 strikeouts, 3 walks. Offensively for Cleveland: J.Ramírez homered; B.Rocchio homered; C.DeLauter went 2-for-5 with 1 RBI. Texas was held scoreless.

games.headline: St. Louis 6, Cincinnati 5 — Soriano (W)
games.summary: George Soriano pitched 1.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs, leading St. Louis past Cincinnati 6-5 at Busch Stadium. Sam Moll lasted 1.0 innings, giving up 2 earned runs, 1 strikeouts. Offensively for St. Louis: J.Walker homered; L.Nootbaar homered with 2 RBI; M.Winn went 2-for-5 with 2 RBI. M.McLain went deep for Cincinnati. Riley O'Brien closed it out for the save.

games.headline: San Diego 3, New York 2 — Rodriguez (W)
games.summary: Bradgley Rodriguez pitched 1.0 innings, allowing 1 earned runs with 1 strikeouts, leading San Diego past New York 3-2 at Petco Park. Austin Warren lasted 2.0 innings, giving up 2 earned runs, 1 strikeouts. Offensively for San Diego: F.Fermin homered with 2 RBI; F.Jr. went 2-for-4 with 1 RBI; S.Song went 2-for-2. M.Semien went deep for New York. Mason Miller closed it out for the save.

games.headline: Chicago 6, Philadelphia 3 — Burke (W)
games.summary: Sean Burke pitched 4.1 innings, allowing 3 earned runs with 7 strikeouts, leading Chicago past Philadelphia 6-3 at Citizens Bank Park. Andrew Painter lasted 4.2 innings, giving up 6 earned runs, 4 strikeouts, 2 walks. Offensively for Chicago: C.Montgomery homered; J.Gonzalez homered with 2 RBI; C.Meidroth went 2-for-4 with 1 RBI. A.Bohm, B.Marsh went deep for Philadelphia. Grant Taylor closed it out for the save.

games.headline: New York Blank Boston, 0-0
games.summary: New York beat Boston 0-0. Boston was held scoreless.

games.headline: Kansas City 3, Minnesota 2 — Strahm (W)
games.summary: Matt Strahm pitched 1.0 innings, allowing 1 earned runs, leading Kansas City past Minnesota 3-2 at Target Field. Eric Orze lasted 1.0 innings, giving up 2 earned runs. Offensively for Kansas City: C.Jensen homered with 2 RBI; B.Jr. went 2-for-5 with 1 RBI; V.Pasquantino went 2-for-5. O.Arcia went deep for Minnesota. Alex Lange closed it out for the save.

games.headline: Miami 4, Tampa Bay 3 — King (W)
games.summary: John King pitched 0.2 innings, allowing 0 earned runs, leading Miami past Tampa Bay 4-3 at loanDepot park. Shane McClanahan lasted 5.0 innings, giving up 4 earned runs, 6 strikeouts, 2 walks. Offensively for Miami: J.Sanoja homered with 2 RBI; O.Lopez went 2-for-4. Tyler Zuber closed it out for the save.

games.headline: Los Angeles 9, Los Angeles 2
games.summary: Yoshinobu Yamamoto pitched 8.0 innings, allowing 1 earned runs with 4 strikeouts, leading Los Angeles past Los Angeles 9-2 at UNIQLO Field at Dodger Stadium. Jack Kochanowicz lasted 0.1 innings, giving up 6 earned runs, 1 strikeouts, 1 walks. Offensively for Los Angeles: S.Ohtani homered with 2 RBI; A.Pages homered with 2 RBI; M.Muncy went 2-for-3. Z.Neto went deep for Los Angeles.

games.headline: Houston 13, Athletics 2
games.summary: Tatsuya Imai pitched 5.0 innings, allowing 2 earned runs with 8 strikeouts, leading Houston past Athletics 13-2 at Daikin Park. Kade Morris lasted 4.0 innings, giving up 9 earned runs, 4 strikeouts, 3 walks. Offensively for Houston: Y.Alvarez homered with 4 RBI; J.Altuve homered; L.Jr. homered with 3 RBI.

games.headline: Seattle Blank Detroit, 4-0
games.summary: Bryce Miller pitched 6.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 9 strikeouts, leading Seattle past Detroit 4-0 at Comerica Park. Keider Montero lasted 5.0 innings, giving up 4 earned runs, 1 strikeouts, 1 walks. Offensively for Seattle: D.Canzone homered with 2 RBI; R.Arozarena went 2-for-3, including 1 double with 2 RBI; J.Pereda went 2-for-4. Detroit was held scoreless.

games.headline: Milwaukee 7, Colorado 1
games.summary: Jacob Misiorowski pitched 7.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 8 strikeouts, leading Milwaukee past Colorado 7-1 at Coors Field. Zach Agnos lasted 3.0 innings, giving up 2 earned runs, 1 strikeouts, 3 walks. Offensively for Milwaukee: B.Turang homered with 2 RBI; W.Contreras homered; J.Bauers homered.

games.headline: Chicago 3, San Francisco 2 (F/10)
games.summary: Ryan Rolison pitched 1.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 2 strikeouts, leading Chicago past San Francisco 3-2 at Wrigley Field. Offensively for Chicago: P.Crow-Armstrong homered with 2 RBI; M.Busch went 2-for-4. R.Devers went deep for San Francisco. The teams needed 10 innings to decide it.

games.headline: Atlanta 6, Pittsburgh 3 — Strider (W)
games.summary: Spencer Strider pitched 5.0 innings, allowing 3 earned runs with 3 strikeouts, leading Atlanta past Pittsburgh 6-3 at Truist Park. Braxton Ashcraft lasted 5.0 innings, giving up 6 earned runs, 5 strikeouts. Offensively for Atlanta: D.Smith homered with 2 RBI; R.Jr. went 2-for-4; M.Dubón went 2-for-4. Raisel Iglesias closed it out for the save.

games.headline: Washington 6, Arizona 1 — Littell (W)
games.summary: C.Mead's two-run home run sparked the Nationals' offense, backed by Zack Littell's five effective innings. Washington defeated the Diamondbacks 6-1, handing Eduardo Rodriguez the loss in a decisive effort.
